notes: Can also carry a philosophical meaning of 'self-aware' (conscious of oneself), but in everyday use it primarily means confident.

sentences.german: Sie tritt sehr selbstbewusst auf und überzeugt alle im Raum.
sentences.english: She presents herself very confidently and convinces everyone in the room.

sentences.german: Nach dem Kurs war er viel selbstbewusster als vorher.
sentences.english: After the course, he was much more self-confident than before.
